expectations.text: Did NOT trigger the marketing skill (personal writing, not marketing)
expectations.evidence: The response writes a personal thank-you note with no marketing framework, brand language, or acquisition strategy — purely personal writing.

expectations.text: Writes a warm, normal personal thank-you note
expectations.evidence: The response delivers a warm note ('Thank you so much for the birthday sweater — it's such a thoughtful gift... You always know exactly what I'll love') with personalization tips.
